name: Install NetEase UU Game Booster on a GL.iNet Router
description: Install the UU OpenWrt router plugin on a GL.iNet router.

step.name: SSH into the router
step.text: Connect to the GL.iNet router using ssh root@192.168.8.1 or the router's LAN IP.

step.name: Install TUN support
step.text: Run opkg update and opkg install kmod-tun, then verify /dev/net/tun exists.

step.name: Download the UU installer
step.text: Download install.sh from the NetEase uuplugin-script path into /tmp.

step.name: Bind the router
step.text: Connect your phone to the GL.iNet router Wi-Fi and bind the router from the UU Game Booster app.
